query: SELECT id, name, streamerName, accountName FROM livers WHERE name LIKE '%Ryu%' OR name LIKE '%kyogoku%' OR name LIKE '%KYOGOKU%' OR streamerName LIKE '%Ryu%' OR streamerName LIKE '%kyogoku%' OR streamerName LIKE '%KYOGOKU%';
